ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "check_number" TEXT /* Check number associated with the transaction */,
  "payee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payee involved in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was last updated */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department related to the transaction */,
  "approval_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is approved */,
  "approval_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the transaction */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payee_id FOREIGN KEY ("payee_id") REFERENCES payees ("payee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_approval_by FOREIGN KEY ("approval_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES transaction_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payees" (
  "payee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payee */,
  "payee_name" TEXT /* Name of the payee */,
  "payee_address" TEXT /* Address of the payee */,
  "payee_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the payee */,
  "payee_type" TEXT /* Type of the payee (e.g., individual, company) */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the payee */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details of the payee */,
  "swift_code" TEXT /* SWIFT code for international transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, employee) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being tracked */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
